title: minuartia helmii
intro: Minuartia helmii, also known as dwarf rockrose or alpine sweethearts, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as inflammation, pain, and respiratory problems. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve coughs, colds, and sore throats, and its leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to promote digestive health and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Minuartia helmii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits and medicinal properties.
